testcase.name: SoundEffect: numeric tokens skip the Sound-typed first key and fill the int+float keys
PotionEffect: type mismatch on TYPE skips to DURATION without losing the rest
Cursor never rewinds: once a later key is assigned, earlier keys stay at default
PotionEffect: a token that no remaining key accepts is reported once via the warn sink
SoundEffect: a leading float token leapfrogs Sound + Integer slots to land on the first Double key
